title: Mouthwatering Mustardy Ukrainian Sausage Stew
description: A hearty one-pot Ukrainian dish featuring sun-dried tomatoes and juicy sausage in a rich mustardy broth, finished to a perfect al-dente texture and suitable for a keto-friendly diet.

ingredients.name: sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.notes: packed in oil, drained and chopped

instructions: Heat a large cazuela over medium-high heat and add the sliced Ukrainian sausage to brown, about 5 minutes.
Remove the browned sausage from the cazuela and set aside, leaving the drippings behind.
Add the minced garlic to the cazuela and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes, yellow mustard, salt, and black pepper to the cazuela, stirring to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and return the browned sausage to the cazuela, simmering for an additional 5 minutes or until the sausage is cooked through and the stew has reached the desired consistency.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed, then stir in the chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
